summary: Created bin/lib/spec.mjs exporting a single frozen PRD_SECTIONS constant defining the seven required PRD sections (Goal, Requirements, Acceptance Criteria, Technical Approach, Testing Strategy, Out of Scope, Done When). Refactored validateSpecFile in outer-loop.mjs and the minimal-spec generators in run.mjs and outer-loop.mjs, plus the buildInteractiveSpec output in brainstorm-cmd.mjs, to import and use this constant instead of redefining the section list locally. All 580 existing tests pass.
